abilities.description: Choose a nonland card name and a number greater than 0. Target player reveals their library. If that library contains exactly the chosen number of cards with the chosen name, CARDNAME deals 8 damage to that player. Then that player shuffles their library.

effect.description: Choose a nonland card name and a number greater than 0. Target player reveals their library. If that library contains exactly the chosen number of cards with the chosen name, CARDNAME deals 8 damage to that player. Then that player shuffles their library.
effect.name: NameCard
